results.title: Former Supermodel Carré Otis Files Complaint Against Gérald Marie Alleging Rape, Trafficking
results.description: PARIS (AP) — Former American supermodel Carré Otis filed a complaint Friday at a Paris court alleging she was raped and trafficked by Gérald Marie, the former European head of Elite Model agency, in a move her lawyer said is meant to encourage other potential victims to come forward. Marie has denied the allegations and [...] The post Former Supermodel Carré Otis Files Complaint Against Gérald Marie Alleging Rape, Trafficking appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Bairstow leads charge as Yorkshire hand out Roses hammering - ESPNcricinfo
results.description: Bairstow leads charge as Yorkshire hand out Roses hammering ESPNcricinfo T20 Blast round-up: Bairstow and Moeen star as Yorkshire inflict record defeat on Lancashire BBC Steven Croft names 14-man squad for Roses T20 at Headingley Lancashire Cricket Club "Bairstow and Luxton, who lit up this fixture at Old Trafford last year with a Yorkshire record T20 stand of 167, added 105 this time from 62 balls" Yorkshire Post Live: Yorkshire’s women precede Roses blockbuster Yorkshire County Cricket Club

results.title: ‘Main Vaapas Aaunga’: Imtiaz Ali and Vedang Raina Talk About Gen Z Relationships and Finding True Love (LatestLY Exclusive)
results.description: Director Imtiaz Ali’s new film, 'Main Vaapas Aaunga', is about forever love that transcends decades. But n the age of social media romances, situationships and long-distance relationships, does true love exist in 2026? LatestLY posed the question to Imtiaz Ali and actor Vedang Raina. Excerpts from the exclusive conversation from the heart of Bollywood.
